videos.highlights: The video critiques Cloudflare's 'code mode' implementation, arguing it misses key aspects of the Model Context Protocol (MCP) and tool calling. It explains how proper tool calling requires more than just code execution, including structured data exchange and context management that Cloudflare's approach may overlook.
videos.worthReading: It's worth watching for developers working with AI tool integration, as it provides critical analysis of implementation approaches and highlights important technical distinctions in how AI systems interact with external tools.
